python.content:
def main():
    with open("intercityDistance.txt") as f:
        nums = [int(x) for x in f.read().split()]
    n = 42
    d = [nums[i * n:(i + 1) * n] for i in range(n)]
    visited = [False] * n
    visited[0] = True
    tour = [0]
    cur = 0
    for _ in range(n - 1):
        best, best_d = -1, None
        for j in range(n):
            if not visited[j] and (best_d is None or d[cur][j] < best_d):
                best, best_d = j, d[cur][j]
        tour.append(best)
        visited[best] = True
        cur = best
    print("TOUR " + " ".join(str(c + 1) for c in tour))

main()

cpp.content:
# Compiles every .cpp in the project; headers in any subfolder are found
# automatically. Add more .cpp/.h files (or paste your own multi-file project)
# and they're built into ./solver — no edits needed.
SRC := $(shell find . -name '*.cpp')
INC := $(addprefix -I,$(shell find . -type d))
solver: $(SRC)
	g++ -O2 -std=c++17 $(INC) $(SRC) -o solver
